concrete.name: concrete
concrete.description: Durable, lasts well despite magic contamination. Will be useful for building structures

vines.name: vines
vines.description: Stolen from living vegetation. Contamination has led to it being stronger than most rope, helpful for construction. Or hurting people as the wild touched found.

scrap.name: scrap
scrap.description: Sometimes it's impossible to fix things. Doesn't mean it can't still be useful though.

remnant magic.name: remnant magic
remnant magic.description: Hard to extract but more easily shaped than what comes out of coal.

moving moss.name: moving moss
moving moss.description: Wild magic doesn't discriminate. Moss especially has turned out to be susceptible to magic. Luckily it's still moss for now.
